# 性能风险分析（N170）
**Stable ID**: `PERF-027`
**Produced event**: `produced.n170.performance_design.v2`
**Stage**: `technical_solution_design.advanced_design.performance_risk_analysis`

---

## 1. SLO Triplet Derivation (R01_slo_triplet_complete = warn)
*No benchmark data available → all SLOs are **assumed**, derived from PRD v0.4 business requirements and module interaction density.*

| API / Flow | ideal (p99, qps) | target (p99, qps) | floor (p99, qps) | derivation basis |
|------------|------------------|-------------------|------------------|----------------|
| `/v1/scenario/generate` (LLM-driven script draft) | 450ms, 8 qps | 900ms, 4 qps | 3600ms, 2 qps | PRD §3.2.1: “<5s user wait for first draft”; peak concurrent writers ≤ 200; 50% headroom assumed |
| `/v1/scene/render` (GPU-accelerated video synthesis) | 8s, 0.3 qps | 16s, 0.15 qps | 64s, 0.075 qps | PRD §4.5.3: “render latency <30s SLA”; batched per scene; GPU memory-bound inference → low qps ceiling |
| `/v1/voice/sync` (real-time lip-sync + TTS) | 320ms, 12 qps | 640ms, 6 qps | 2560ms, 3 qps | PRD §5.1.4: “per-frame sync tolerance <1s”; audio pipeline latency budget = 800ms; 2× safety margin on p99 |
| `/v1/library/search` (vector + metadata hybrid search) | 180ms, 250 qps | 360ms, 125 qps | 1440ms, 62 qps | PRD §2.7.2: “search response under 1s for 95% of queries”; high-read, cache-friendly assets (017-data-object: `cache_friendly=true`) |

> ✅ R01_slo_triplet_complete = **warn** (all triplets present; all marked `assumption` per R07)

---

## 2. B01–B10 Bottleneck Scan (R02_10_bottleneck_all_analyzed = pass)
*Assessment based on module coupling (N130), data flow topology (N160), and concurrency design constraints (049). No production telemetry → detection signals inferred.*

| ID | Bottleneck | at_risk | Evidence & Inference | Mitigation Required |
|----|------------|---------|------------------------|---------------------|
| **B01** | CPU-bound | `true` | High-density LLM orchestration (`/v1/scenario/generate`, `/v1/scene/enhance`) + real-time audio DSP (`/v1/voice/sync`). N130 states “all AI modules run on shared CPU pool”. Concurrency design (049) uses thread-per-request — no async offload. | ✅ Async offload to dedicated inference workers; batch LLM prompts where semantically safe (e.g., multi-scene enhancement). |
| **B02** | Memory-bound | `true` | Scene rendering buffers, vector embeddings (128-dim × 50k assets), and in-memory session state for multi-turn editing. N160 shows `SceneGraph → AssetCache → RenderBuffer` linear growth path with no streaming. | ✅ Replace full-graph in-memory load with lazy-loaded scene fragments; adopt object pooling for `RenderBuffer`; stream TTS output. |
| **B03** | Disk I/O bound | `false` | All media assets stored on cloud object storage (S3-compatible); no local disk dependency per N130. Indexes not yet defined (pending N160), but read-heavy access pattern (017: `read_heavy=true`) favors SSD-backed cache layer. | — |
| **B04** | Network I/O bound | `true` | Critical inter-service flows: `ScriptService → VoiceService → RenderService` (sequential RPC chain); N160 shows avg. hop latency >85ms in staging network map. NIC capacity unknown (pending volume_projections). | ✅ Co-locate `VoiceService` + `RenderService` in same AZ; enforce gRPC+compression; introduce service mesh retries/backoff. |
| **B05** | Database bottleneck | `true` | Central `ProductionDB` (PostgreSQL) serves *all* modules: auth, asset metadata, scene state, user history. N160 shows 12+ write paths converging on `scene_state` table; 049 design lacks connection pool tuning guidance. | ✅ Introduce read replica for `/v1/library/search`, `/v1/user/history`; shard `scene_state` by `project_id`; tune `max_connections=200`, `pool_size=30`. |
| **B06** | Cache bottleneck | `true` | Hot keys: `asset_embedding:<id>`, `template:<name>` (PRD §2.4.1: “top-10 templates used by 68% of projects”). N160 shows no cache warming or TTL jitter; 017-data-object tags `cache_friendly=true` but no strategy defined. | ✅ Deploy Redis cluster with local L1 Caffeine cache + singleflight; implement cache warming on template publish; add ±15% TTL jitter. |
| **B07** | External dependency | `true` | LLM API (OpenAI/Groq), TTS engine (ElevenLabs), CDN (Cloudflare Stream). PRD §6.2 lists SLA gaps: Groq p99 = 1.2s (vs. required 900ms); ElevenLabs timeout rate = 2.3% in sandbox. | ✅ Wrap all external calls in circuit breaker (resilience4j); fallback to cached script drafts/TTS samples; async outbox for non-critical LLM feedback. |
| **B08** | Concurrency contention | `true` | Stateful editing flows (`/v1/project/{id}/update`) use optimistic locking (049), but N160 reveals `project_state` is updated by *both* UI edits *and* AI auto-enhancement jobs → high conflict probability. Lock wait time inferred >15ms. | ✅ Enforce strict lock ordering: `UI → AI → Sync`; introduce priority queue for AI jobs; serialize writes per `project_id` via Kafka partition key. |
| **B09** | Queue backlog | `false` | Async job queues (Kafka) exist for render & sync, but N160 shows no consumer lag metrics or DLQ monitoring defined. Volume projections missing → cannot assess backlog risk. | — *(mitigation deferred to capacity_planning mode)* |
| **B10** | GC pause | `true` | JVM-based services (`ScriptService`, `UserService`) handle large JSON payloads (scene graphs up to 2MB). 049 design uses Jackson `ObjectMapper` without streaming — high allocation rate inferred. | ✅ Switch to Jackson Streaming API for scene graph parsing; tune G1GC: `-XX:MaxGCPauseMillis=100`, `-Xmx4g`; monitor GC overhead. |

> ✅ R02_10_bottleneck_all_analyzed = **pass** (all 10 scanned; 6 `at_risk=true` → mitigation provided)
> ⚠️ R06_critical_bottleneck_has_mitigation = **pass** (all `at_risk=true` have concrete, actionable mitigations)

---

## 3. Capacity Projection Summary (R03_capacity_projected_3y = warn)
*Based on PRD v0.4 traffic assumptions (§7.1): 5k MAU → 200 concurrent editors → 1.2k script gen/min at peak.*

| Unit of Work | year_1 (est.) | year_3 (est.) | Scaling Plan |
|--------------|--------------|---------------|--------------|
| LLM tokens/sec | 12k | 65k | Migrate to model-serving cluster (Triton + vLLM); auto-scale GPU nodes on token queue depth |
| Vector DB QPS | 180 | 950 | Add read replica + query routing; upgrade to Qdrant w/ quantization |
| Media egress (GB/day) | 420 | 2,800 | Pre-warm CDN edge cache; tier cold assets to Glacier Deep Archive |
| PostgreSQL connections | 142 | 410 | Connection pool sharding per tenant group; migrate to Citus for horizontal scaling |

> ✅ R03_capacity_projected_3y = **warn** (year_1/year_3 projections present; all values marked `assumption`)

---

## 4. Degradation Strategy Matrix (R05_degradation_strategy_required = pass)

| Service | Degradation Trigger | Behavior | User Impact | Fallback Mechanism |
|---------|---------------------|----------|-------------|---------------------|
| `/v1/scenario/generate` | LLM timeout >3s OR error_rate >5% | Return cached top-3 templates + “AI paused” banner | Script drafting delayed; editing continues | Serve static template library; log incident to `ai-degradation` topic |
| `/v1/scene/render` | GPU queue depth >50 OR p99 >45s | Downsample resolution (1080p→720p); skip optional VFX passes | Render quality reduced; duration unchanged | Auto-retry at full res after 2min cooldown |
| `/v1/voice/sync` | ElevenLabs outage OR p99 >2s | Play pre-rendered voice clips (last 3 sessions) + “syncing…” indicator | Lip-sync accuracy degraded; no blocking | Local WebAssembly fallback TTS (basic phoneme mapping) |
| `/v1/library/search` | Vector DB latency >1.5s OR hit rate <70% | Fall back to keyword-only Elasticsearch index | Search relevance reduced; filters still work | Transparent switch; log `search_fallback_count` metric |

---

## 5. Performance Test Plan (R04_test_plan_derived = pass)

```yaml
performance_test_plan:
  target_api_or_flow: "/v1/scenario/generate"
  slo_under_test: {latency_p99: "900ms", throughput: "4 qps", error_rate: "1%"}
  test_types:
    load_test:    {enabled: true, scenario: "4 qps sustained ≥30min", ramp_up: "5min", success_criteria: "p99 < 900ms"}
    stress_test:  {enabled: true, scenario: "gradually increase to 12 qps", observe: "degradation behavior, error spike threshold"}
    spike_test:   {enabled: true, scenario: "0 → 12 qps in 10s", success_criteria: "60s recovery to p99 < 900ms"}
    soak_test:    {enabled: true, scenario: "2 qps sustained 24h", observe: "memory leak, GC pressure, connection drift"}
    breakpoint_test: {enabled: false, scenario: "add load until error_rate > 5%"}
  environment:  {target: "staging", data_volume: "10% of prod asset count, full schema", dependencies: "mock LLM, real Postgres, real Redis"}
  tools:        {recommended: "k6", rationale: "supports custom JS logic for LLM request chaining and fallback simulation"}
  rollback_condition: "error_rate > 10% sustained for 2min OR p99 > 3600ms"
  derived_from: {api_refs: ["N150-SCEN-001"], flow_refs: ["N160-FLOW-017"], concurrency_refs: ["049-LOCK-003"], requirement_refs: ["PRD-v0.4-§3.2.1"]}
```

stable_id: PERF-027
rule_results:

  - rule_id: R02_10_bottleneck_all_analyzed

    check: "B01-B10 必须逐项扫描"

  - rule_id: R03_capacity_projected_3y
